common.legalFullEnglish: Bonke amagama omthetho aphelele atholakala ngesiNgisi ngezansi.

home.playCostNote: $0.01 USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo per paid game. Keep a little CELO for network fees (gas).
home.top100Prize: Abadlali abangu-100 abaphezulu bahlukanisa izinzuzo zepule
home.prizeCodeSubtitle: Ikhodi yomklomelo engahleliwe evela kusiteshi seTelegram. Joyina isiteshi noma cindezela ? ukuze uthole imininingwane.

landing.walletCostNotice: Each paid game is $0.01 in USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo. Keep a small CELO balance for gas. Wallets may use CELO if stable gas fails.
landing.walletExtensionNote: Don’t see Phantom or “Other browser wallet”? Install Phantom (enable Ethereum) or refresh after installing a wallet.
landing.connectSubtitle: Khetha isikhwama: izandiso kuqala, bese i-QR ye-Valora uma kunikwe amandla.
landing.connectValoraQrSub: WalletConnect — scan with Valora or another mobile wallet
landing.connectUserRejected: You cancelled the wallet prompt. Try again when ready.
landing.walletHint: Phantom: enable Ethereum in the extension. Valora QR: set NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID (free from cloud.reown.com). Gray button: wallets that use window.ethereum.

leaderboard.title: Uhlu lwabadlali
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentDesc: Imicimbi yenyanga iqala ngo-1 Ephreli futhi iphela ngo-1 Meyi
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentSub: Abadlali abaphezulu bathola imali yangempela nyanga zonke
leaderboard.top100Extra: 🎁 Abadlali abangu-100 abaphezulu bahlukanisa izinzuzo zepule

profile.supportSubtitle: Bika izinkinga noma uthole usizo nge-Telegram

airdrop.title: Izinzuzo
airdrop.telegramRewardsIntro: Faka amakhodi esikhashana avela kuTelegram uma i-round isebenza. Xhuma i-wallet yakho kuqala.
airdrop.telegramPrizeLiveNow: Kuyabukhoma manje - faka ngaphambi kuka {timer}. Ama-wallet okuqala angu-5 athola imiklomelo.
airdrop.telegramPrizeWaitingDescription: Joyina isiteshi ubuke imiyalezo. Amakhodi aphuma ngezikhathi ezingahleliwe. Ama-wallet okuqala angu-5 ayawina.
airdrop.telegramPrizeHelpItem1: Ikhodi ithunyelwa kuTelegram kanye ngosuku ngesikhathi esingahleliwe (vula izaziso).
airdrop.telegramPrizeHelpItem2: Uma i-round ibukhoma, unesikhathi esifushane sokufaka ikhodi kuleli khasi (i-wallet kufanele ixhumeke).
airdrop.telegramPrizeHelpItem3: Ama-wallet amahlanu okuqala ahlukene afaka ikhodi efanele aqoshwa njengabanqobi.
airdrop.telegramPrizeHelpItem4: Ukufaka ikhodi efanayo futhi kusuka ku-wallet efanayo akungezi enye indawo yokuwina.
airdrop.holdIntro: Bamba ama-TPOINT akho ukuze uvule izinkokhelo nezinsiza ezikhethekile!
airdrop.periodicalPrizesDesc: Hlala phakathi kwabadlali abaphezulu ku-Hlulu uthole izinzuzo ku-MiniPay ngokwesikhathi.
airdrop.maximizeScoreDesc: Yenza amaphuzu aphezulu ngemdlalo ngamunye. Zama ngokwakho!
airdrop.leaveProfitDesc: Ungaphuma ngenzuzo — ngisho ngaphezu kuka-🪙10 000+. Abadlali abaqinile bangenza kangakanani!
airdrop.leaderboardBanner: 🏆 Abadlali abaphezulu bathola izinzuzo ku-MiniPay. Qhubeka ukudlala!
airdrop.airdropBlurb: Hlala uzilolile! Uhlelo lwethu lwe-airdrop luzonika abadlali abathembekile be-Tradcast amathokeni akhethekile.

market.title: Imakethe
market.subtitle: Thenga energy, khulisa imiklomelo yakho, bese ukhipha ama-TPOINTs.
market.energyPacksSubtitle: Gcwalisa i-energy yakho nge-stablecoins (USDC / USDT / USDm).
market.boostersSubtitle: Zuza ama-TPOINTs nama-score aphindwe ngesikhathi esilinganiselwe.
market.boostersFooter: Isikhathi se-boost nokuphela kwaso kugcinwa ku-on-chain ukuze kuthembeke.
market.payoutsSubtitle: Shisa ama-TPOINTs uthole i-stablecoin evela ku-treasury.
market.payoutsFooter: Usuku lokushisa luboshwe ku-on-chain - iwindi lokufinyelela liyahlolwa.
market.invitationSubtitle: Mema abangani uthole ama-TPOINTs. Faka isicelo njalo emahoreni angu-24.
market.invitationFooter: Ubuningi obungu-10,000 TPOINTs ngesicelo - isicelo esingu-1 njalo emahoreni angu-23.5.
market.streakSubtitle: Funa ama-TPOINTs amahhala nsuku zonke uma i-streak yakho ingu-10+.
market.streakFooter: Ubuningi obungu-5,000 TPOINTs ngesicelo - isicelo esingu-1 njalo emahoreni angu-23.5.
market.disclaimer: Lezi zici azikabikhona bukhoma okwamanje. Ama-smart contract asaqedwa - hlala ubheke izibuyekezo.

tradearea.gameBusyDesc: Iseva inabantu abaningi. Zama futhi kamuva.
tradearea.liquidatedDesc: Ibhalansi yakho ifinyelele 🪙0. Intando engcono esikhathini esizayo!

about.mainP1: I-Tradcast umdlalo wokulingisa ukuthengisa ngamanani angempela. Yonke idatha iyamanani omakethe angempela ahlanganisiwe.
about.mainP2: Zithole ngaphandle kwengozi yemali. Funda ukufunda amashadi nokuphatha izimo.
about.longExpl: LONG: Vula isimo eside noma engeza 🪙100. Inzuzo uma intengo iyakhuphuka.
about.shortExpl: SHORT: Vula isimo esifushane noma engeza 🪙100. Inzuzo uma intengo iyehla.
about.closeExpl: VALA: Vala isimo sakho bese uthola inzuzo noma ukulahlekelwa.
about.rule1: Awukwazi ukuvula LONG ne-SHORT ngasikhathi sinye
about.flow1: Qala umdlalo ubuke ishadi lesikhathi sangempela
about.flow2: Vula izimo usebenzisa LONG noma SHORT
about.flow3: Vala uma ukulungele ukuthola inzuzo noma ukunciphisa ukulahlekelwa
about.flow4: Chofoza "Thatha bese uyaphuma" ukuze uthole amathokeni e-TPOINT
about.feat1Desc: Thengisa ngokunyakaza kwamanani angempela emakethe ye-crypto.
about.feat2Desc: Zonke izimo zisebenzisa i-20× (inzuzo nokulahlekelwa kukhuliswe).
about.feat3Desc: Thola inzuzo ezithengisweni zakho bese uthola ama-TPOINT njengezinzuzo.
about.feat4Desc: Khuphukela ohlwini ubonise amakhono akho okuthengisa.
about.footerNote: Qala ukuzithola manje ukwakha amakhono akho okuthengisa!
